mapper.select: SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID=#{useStplatId}

SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE REPRSNT_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY APLC_DE DESC, USE_STPLAT_ID DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND USE_STPLAT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND USE_STPLAT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY USE_STPLAT_NM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND USE_STPLAT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND USE_STPLAT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
